description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a matte, parchment-colored label featuring bold red Cyrillic lettering and sepia-toned illustrations of a traditional building. The label wraps fully around the can, with decorative elements such as a wax seal motif and stylized borders that evoke a rustic, old-world aesthetic. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab closure. The main label text is large and prominent, with additional smaller text and design details visible on the sides. The can appears unopened and is free of visible condensation or damage. The overall design suggests a traditional, possibly Eastern European beer.
description: A tall, parchment-labeled aluminum beer can with bold red Cyrillic text and sepia illustrations, topped with a silver pull tab.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with large red Cyrillic letters and a sepia illustration of a building.
description_view_1: This side view reveals more label text in smaller fonts and the continuation of the parchment-style background.
description_view_2: This view shows the less decorated side of the can, with only partial text and a wax seal motif visible.
description_view_3: This view highlights the wax seal graphic and additional Cyrillic text, with the label's rustic design continuing around the can.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a parchment-style background with bold red Cyrillic text, sepia-toned illustrations of a traditional building, and a wax seal motif. The design uses rustic, old-world elements and a matte finish for a vintage look.
